nasb.text: Is it being said, O house of Jacob: ‘Is the Spirit of the Lord impatient? Are these His doings?’ Do not My words do good To the one walking uprightly?

esv.text: Should this be said, O house of Jacob? Has the Lord grown impatient? Are these his deeds? Do not my words do good to him who walks uprightly?

cnv.text: 雅各家啊！人怎可說： “耶和華的心著急，不能忍耐呢？ 這些是他的作為嗎？” 我耶和華的話對行事正直的人不是有益的嗎？

ccb.text: 雅各家啊，你们怎能说： “耶和华已经不耐烦了吗？ 祂会做这些事吗？” “我的话岂不有益于行为正直的人吗？
